prose:
Electrostatics property: gas-phase dipole moment of glycine zwitterion.

Method provenance block
1. Property: Dipole magnitude (|μ|) in Debye.
2. Level of theory: GFN2-xTB (semi-empirical tight-binding) as implemented in xtb.
3. Geometry: taken exactly from the provided file glycine_zwitterion.xyz; no further geometry optimisation—single-point electrostatics calculation (GFN2-xTB//input geometry).
4. Solvent/environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent).
5. Charge 0, multiplicity 1 (closed-shell singlet).
6. Software: xtb v6.6 via chemkit electrostatics skill.
7. Convergence & caveats: calculation ran to completion; SCF converged (reported by backend). No warnings returned.

Headline result
|μ| = 11.635852 D

Live log & reproducibility
The run streamed to a live .out file (path printed at launch by chemkit; available on request). Command recorded in the skill’s JSON (`cli_invocation`).

No warnings were issued; integrity status ‘ok’, trustworthy=true.
